# End of Life Midwife — Pat Dodge

> INELDA-trained End-of-Life Midwife serving families in Franklin and Licking Counties, Ohio.

## About

Pat Dodge is an End-of-Life Midwife based in Granville, Ohio, serving the greater Columbus area including all of Franklin County and Licking County. She is trained by INELDA — the International End-of-Life Doula Association.

An end-of-life midwife (also called a death doula or end-of-life doula) provides non-medical, compassionate support to dying individuals and their families. This includes bedside presence and vigil, legacy and life review work, advance care planning conversations, and family education and support.

## Services

- **Bedside Presence & Vigil** — Calm, compassionate presence during the active dying process for the individual and family
- **Legacy & Life Review** — Documenting stories, letters, and memories through recorded conversations, written letters, or memory books
- **Advance Care Planning** — Guiding families through conversations about wishes, values, and care decisions
- **Family Education & Support** — Helping families understand the dying process and feel prepared

## Service Area

Franklin County, Ohio — including Columbus, Westerville, Dublin, Grove City, Hilliard, Gahanna, Grandview Heights, Bexley, Upper Arlington, Reynoldsburg

Licking County, Ohio — including Newark, Heath, Pataskala, Granville, Hebron, Johnstown, Etna, Alexandria

## Credentials

- Trained by INELDA (International End-of-Life Doula Association)
